Notes: Primary key preservation. Non-negotiable — needed for reconciliation and for post-migration resolution of stock.warehouse.x_aa_default_storage_location_id back to the actual stock.location record. Custom field must be created on stock.location.

Short location code (e.g., "A01", "RECEIVING"). Odoo's name is the location's primary display identifier — Exact Code is the closest semantic match (short, unique within warehouse). Complete hierarchical name ("WH/Stock/A01") is auto-computed by Odoo via complete_name.

Longer human-readable description of the location. No clean native target: stock.location.comment is html (type mismatch) and name is reserved for the short code. Preserved as a custom field for audit/reference. Custom field must be created on stock.location.

Parent location. Resolution path (two-step): Exact Warehouse GUID → stock.warehouse (via x_aa_exact_id) → warehouse.lot_stock_id. This reparents the Exact storage location under the warehouse's main internal Stock location, giving Odoo the correct hierarchy. stock.location.warehouse_id then auto-computes from the parent chain.
Maps to company. Single-division migration → hardcode to target company.

Flag for the primary storage location within a warehouse. There's always exactly one main storage location per Exact warehouse. No native equivalent in Odoo (the warehouse's lot_stock_id already plays the role of "main location"). Stored for audit — custom field must be created on stock.location.

Sequence for picking operations within the warehouse. Odoo has posx/posy/posz (corridor/shelf/height) but those are 3D coordinates, not a flat picking sequence. No clean native equivalent — stored as a custom integer field for audit and for potential post-migration use in picking routing rules. Custom field must be created on stock.location.
Audit field. Lookup user GUID → res.users. Default to admin if unmapped. Dependency: user mapping not yet done.
Audit field. Lookup user GUID → res.users. Default to admin if unmapped. Dependency: user mapping not yet done.
Denormalized display copy of Warehouse. Value derivable from location_id → warehouse_id → stock.warehouse.code.
Denormalized display copy of Warehouse. Value derivable from location_id → warehouse_id → stock.warehouse.name.
Required. Default to 'internal' — Exact storage locations are physical locations inside the warehouse and map to Odoo's internal location type by definition.
